# Q360

> Q360 is a comprehensive 360° HR/ERP platform built with Django and Django REST Framework, designed for government-sector organizations in Azerbaijan.

## Platform Overview

Q360 provides end-to-end human resource management capabilities including 360-degree performance evaluations, competency frameworks, succession planning, and workforce analytics. The platform is bilingual (Azerbaijani and English) and follows enterprise-grade security standards including 2FA, RBAC, and GDPR compliance.

## Core Modules

- **360° Performance Evaluation**: Multi-rater assessments including self, manager, peer, and subordinate evaluations with radar charts and trend analysis.
- **Competency Framework**: Define organizational competencies, behavioral indicators, and proficiency levels mapped to roles and departments.
- **Performance Reviews**: Structured review cycles with goal-setting, KPI tracking, and calibration workflows.
- **9-Box Grid / Talent Matrix**: Visual talent classification based on performance and potential axes for succession planning.
- **Succession Planning**: Identify critical roles, map talent pipelines, and track readiness levels for key positions.
- **OKR Management**: Objectives and Key Results tracking with alignment to organizational strategy.
- **Development Plans**: Individual development goals linked to competency gaps identified through evaluations.
- **Training Management**: Course catalog, enrollment tracking, and learning path recommendations.
- **Recruitment**: Job posting, applicant tracking, and hiring workflow management.
- **Compensation & Benefits**: Salary structures, bonus calculations, and compensation benchmarking.
- **Leave & Attendance**: Time-off requests, attendance tracking, and leave balance management.
- **Employee Wellness**: Wellness program management and employee wellbeing tracking.
- **Engagement Surveys**: Pulse surveys and engagement analytics with sentiment analysis.
- **Continuous Feedback**: Real-time peer feedback and recognition system.
- **Workforce Planning**: Headcount planning, scenario modeling, and workforce analytics.
- **Reports & Analytics**: Comprehensive reporting with export to PDF and Excel.

## Technical Stack

- Backend: Django 5.x, Django REST Framework, Celery, Redis
- Database: PostgreSQL 16
- Frontend: Server-side rendered templates with Tailwind CSS, Alpine.js, Chart.js
- Authentication: JWT + Session, 2FA (TOTP), RBAC/ABAC
- Deployment: Docker, Nginx, Gunicorn

## Public Page Structure

- `/` — Landing page (product overview, features, FAQ)
- `/haqqimizda/` — About page (mission, team, contact)
- `/faq/` — Frequently Asked Questions
- `/privacy/` — Privacy Policy
- `/terms/` — Terms of Service
- `/help/` — Help & Documentation

## Contact

- Email: info@q360.gov.az
- Location: Baku, Azerbaijan
